chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1555 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. 7448/2024 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A. 7449/2024 4. For orders on M.A. 7450/2024 5. For hearing of main case 29.10.2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Domki Advocate for Petitioners. ----- 1. Granted. 2to5. It is stated that this Petition is for Public Interest as Respondents are awarding Contracts without adhering to SPPRA Rules. On specific question, it is stated that Petitioner never participated in Bid proceedings. Writ of Mandamus cannot be issued without a locus standi of Petitioner. Petition is dismissed along with pending Applications. Petitioner may avail other remedies if available. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
